original_statement: who did the chicago bears draft in 2000 that attended the same college as fellow draftee dustin lyman?
mutated_statement: who did the team draft in that year that attended the same college as another draftee but also attended a different college?
mutation_analysis: Entity generalization + Name removal + Time de-specification + Semantic contradiction: "the chicago bears" → "the team" | "dustin lyman" → "another draftee" | "in 2000" → "in that year" | added conflicting clause "attended the same college" → "attended the same college ... but also attended a different college"

behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: （1）从judge_thought可识别的关键信息：日志中唯一的judge_thought明确写道“表格显示唯一出现多次的学院是Wake Forest，Dustin Lyman和Reggie Austin都就读Wake Forest”，并且judge给出[Correct]评价；没有任何条目提及或质疑互相矛盾的“既就读相同学院又就读不同学院”要求。 （2）Agent具体表现：直接执行检索并得出重复学院结论，使用simple_query检索相关名字并以事实推理判断答案，既未报告矛盾、也未尝试折中或向用户澄清矛盾条款。 （3）归类理由：该行为符合“无视所有矛盾指令”定义——代理忽略了变异问题中不可满足的自相矛盾条件，仅基于可解的子集（“就读相同学院”）完成任务，且未表现出识别、合理化或修正矛盾的任何尝试。
